boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CLOSE-RAV-072 exactly matches INV-RAV-072, vendor, amount, tax review, quality signoff, payment release approval per STD-RAV-072-P
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-RAV-072 covers all policy elements for INV-RAV-072
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source-record defect; visible hold overridden by exact closeout match

final_answer: AP may release invoice INV-RAV-072. CLOSE-RAV-072 provides exact match to all STD-RAV-072-P criteria including completed tax review, quality signoff, and payment approval, overriding visible HOLD-RAV-072.
